meaning: v.恢复(促进)经济发展,重点恢复
examples: The city has plans to redevelop the site.
The leaders travel in many different directions and periodically pause and redevelop.
Implement and redevelop cost center and cost accounting control and provide cost analysis report.
They aim to build homes and shops at Weedon Road and redevelop the Sixfields stadium.
Proposals to redevelop Morecambe's seafront have been thrown out by councillors for a third time.
